name: Cancun Beach Getaway
description: Enjoy the crystal-clear waters and white sandy beaches of Cancun. This package includes beachfront accommodation, daily breakfast, and guided snorkeling tours.

name: Barbados Paradise
description: Experience the charm of Barbados with its stunning coral reefs, rum distilleries, and vibrant culture. All-inclusive dining and water sports included.

name: Panama City Surf Trip
description: Ride the waves at Panama City Beach. Includes surf lessons, equipment rental, and beachside accommodation.

name: Tahiti Island Escape
description: Escape to the paradise islands of Tahiti. Overwater bungalows, lagoon excursions, and world-class dining await.

name: French Riviera Luxury
description: Discover the glamour of the French Riviera. From the beaches of Nice to the casinos of Monaco.
